nasb.text: The altar also was split apart and the ashes were poured out from the altar, according to the sign which the man of God had given by the word of the Lord.

esv.text: The altar also was torn down, and the ashes poured out from the altar, according to the sign that the man of God had given by the word of the Lord.

cnv.text: 祭壇也破裂了，灰從祭壇上傾撒下來，好像神人奉耶和華的命令所提出的預兆一樣。

ccb.text: 这时，祭坛破裂了，坛上的灰也撒了出来，应验了上帝的仆人奉耶和华之命所说的征兆。
